prestazioni: Engine: Hyundai Beta II 2.7L V6 (G6BA) with forged internals including Manley H-beam connecting rods (6.123" length, 4340 steel) and JE Pistons (87.5mm bore, 9.5:1 compression, forged 2618 aluminum) to handle 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) boost from a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor inducer) with a custom 3" divorced wastegate setup using a Turbosmart Comp-Gate40 actuator

Fuel System: Full return-style fuel system with an Aeromotive A1000 fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors (1050cc/min), and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup (PCV and CCV separation) to prevent oil contamination in the intake tract under high boost

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.5-way, 85% lockup) paired with a PPG straight-cut dog engagement gearset (1.5:1 1st gear, 1.1:1 2nd gear) in a reinforced Hyundai Tuscani 6-speed transmission (M6GF2) with a Spec Stage 3+ clutch (6 puck, cerametallic, 700 lb-ft torque capacity) and a Fidanza aluminum flywheel (11.5 lbs)

Suspension: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 30-way rebound, 16-way compression) with custom valving for the Tuscani's 5x114.3 bolt pattern, paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear) and spherical bearing end links (SuperPro poly bushings for subframe mounts)

ECU & Tuning: Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with a custom 4D ignition map (Mazda RX-8 coil packs, NGK R7437-9 iridium plugs gapped at 0.024") and a flex fuel sensor (Continental 22680AA090) for E85 compatibility, tuned on a Dynapack hub dyno with a target of 420whp on 93 octane (500whp on E85)
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Tuscani-specific, 3-piece front bumper with integrated carbon fiber canards, 2-piece overfenders with riveted aluminum reinforcement, and a duckbill carbon fiber rear wing with 3D-printed adjustable mounts for 150 lbs of downforce at 120 mph)

Exterior: Full Respray in Nissan GT-R Nismo Heritage Racing Yellow (code: 3Y0) with a 3M Matte Black roof wrap and custom vinyl overlays (1.5mm thick, 3M 1080 series) for the hood vents and side skirts, paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +22 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) in a matte gunmetal finish with Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)

Interior: Full Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with custom Tuscani-specific mounting brackets (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly), paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub (6-bolt, 70mm PCD) and a Momo Prototipo Evo wheel (350mm diameter, suede). Full custom roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded 1.75" x 0.120" DOM steel) with integrated harness bar and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses (ASM homologation).
